meaning: n.温室,生长于温室的,温床,干燥室
examples: The concept of indoor farming is not new, since hothouse production of tomatoes and other produce has been in vogue for some time.
The gonadal development of Chinese turtle, Trionyx sinensis, cultured in hothouse was investigated.
At most, it would become a super hothouse planet like Venus?
Suddenly, a hardy perennial of the Washington political hothouse is once again in full bloom.
Summarising Oakeshott in this way is bound to make him sound a hothouse English plant.
